'''Dann Drugah''' was a shy [[Droid/Legends|droid]] expert who was part of the ''[[FarStar]]'' crew during the hunt for [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]].

==Biography==
In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], Drugah worked in a repair shop on [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]]. Following the liberation of the planet by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], he signed onto the crew of the ''FarStar''. He didn't seek fortune or revenge, or even to see new worlds. His only goal was to be left alone with his droids. He was possibly assigned as the ship's chief droid technician.

==Personality and traits==
Drugah was a reserved Human, and was only active and friendly when surrounded by droids. He considered droids to be his best friends, and was awkward when talking with living beings. He was adamant about not damaging other beings and always rejected blasters that were offered to him.
